'''TT-32-GE3''' was the thirty-second [[GE3-series protocol droid]] to find itself in the employ of [[Tien Tubb]], its predecessors all having been destroyed in accidents (including explosions). TT-32 asked [[Meetra Surik]] to retrieve [[IT-31]] from [[Kodin]] and later rewarded her for completing the task.

{{Droid-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
